questions.q: Former President Donald Trump recently agreed with fan backlash over what issue regarding the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
Which Real Madrid player was taken to the hospital following a dressing room clash with teammate Aurélien Tchouaméni?
How did FIFA President Gianni Infantino justify the high ticket prices for the 2026 World Cup in the United States?
options: They are priced at the U.S. market rate
To pay for expanded team rosters
questions.correctText: They are priced at the U.S. market rate

questions.q: Which tennis tournament recently sided with players urging a boycott over Grand Slam prize money?
